About關於我們

About Alpha Rotation Lab 關於阿爾法輪動實驗室

A quantitative research collective publishing systematic ETF model outputs for global investors. 一個為全球投資者發佈系統化 ETF 模型輸出的量化研究團隊。

Research Collective · 量化研究團隊

Who We Are我們是誰

Alpha Rotation Lab is a quantitative research collective formed by experienced practitioners from both U.S. and Chinese capital markets. Our team combines deep domain knowledge in systematic strategies, factor modeling, and cross-market rotation. 阿爾法輪動實驗室由中美資本市場資深從業者組成。我們在系統化策略、因子建模和跨市場輪動領域擁有長期豐富的實踐經驗。

We do not provide investment advice. We publish transparent, rules-based model outputs — designed for disciplined investors who want to remove emotion from asset allocation decisions. 我們不提供投資建議，而是發佈透明、規則驅動的量化模型輸出，旨在幫助紀律型投資者在資產配置中排除情緒干擾。

🚀 Roadmap · 產品路線圖

What's Coming Next即將推出

Alpha Rotation Lab is continuously expanding its model suite. Beyond the current ETF rotation framework, the following research products are in development and will be launched progressively. 阿爾法輪動實驗室持續擴充模型矩陣。在現有 ETF 輪動框架之外，以下研究產品正在開發中，將陸續推出。

Research Framework研究框架

Systematic process.
Repeatable output. 系統化流程
可重複的模型輸出

The model follows a structured, rules-based methodology — no discretionary judgment, no guesswork. 模型遵循結構化、規則驅動的方法論——零主觀判斷，零猜測成分。

Core Methodology核心方法論

  • ▶Evaluate ETF relative strength across universe評估 ETF 宇宙中的相對強弱
  • ▶Rank ETFs based on momentum metrics基於動量指標對 ETF 進行排名
  • ▶Apply trend strength and volatility filters應用趨勢強度與波動率過濾器
  • ▶Monitor risk environment and market regime監測風險環境與市場狀態
  • ▶Publish standardised model output weekly每週發佈標準化模型輸出

Model Output Labels模型輸出標籤

  • ▶Positive Momentum — trend above filter, strong relative strength正向動量 — 趨勢在過濾線上方，相對強度強
  • ▶Improving Trend — emerging relative strength, trend recovering趨勢改善 — 相對強度浮現，趨勢企穩回升
  • ▶Neutral — mixed signals, no clear momentum direction中性 — 信號混合，無明確動量方向
  • ▶Weak / Risk-Off — below trend filter, elevated risk environment偏弱/避險 — 在趨勢過濾線下方，風險環境升溫

US ETF Rotation  ·  Model V6.2

Backtest 2019.01.02 – 2026.05.06  ·  Benchmark: S&P 500 (SPY)  ·  Cost: 0.15% one-way  ·  Weekly rebalance

02 · Performance Analysis

📈 Why S&P 500 Leads in Raw Return

The 2019–2026 period was dominated by mega-cap tech concentration. By 2024, the top 10 S&P 500 holdings represented over 35% of the index — Nvidia alone rose 200%+ in both 2023 and 2024.

SPY's market-cap weighting automatically captures this concentration in full. The rotation model, diversifying across a broad ETF universe with explicit regime-based risk control, intentionally reduces mega-cap exposure — most visible in 2021 (SPY +30.51% vs model +22.01%) and 2024 (SPY +25.59% vs model +5.16%).

This is the model's design: accept a moderate return lag to achieve substantially lower drawdown. The same mega-cap concentration that drove 2024 returns caused the S&P 500 to fall 34% in 2022. The rotation model lost only 17.78% that year.

🛡️ The Risk-Control Trade-Off

Giving up 0.75% annual return, the model achieves dramatic improvements in every risk metric — the strongest case for systematic risk management.

Annual return given up
−0.75%/yr
Max drawdown reduced
−10.14 pp (30%)
Sharpe ratio improved
+0.113
Calmar ratio improved
+0.192

2020 COVID crash: model −21.80% vs SPY −33.72% — 11.9 pp protected at the worst moment.
2022 bear market: model −17.78% vs SPY −18.65% — defensive cash in T-bills turned the tide.

ℹ  2024 underperformance note: 2024 was an extraordinary mega-cap concentration year. Nvidia's weighting in SPY exceeded most sector ETFs. The model's diversification was a material headwind (−20.43% alpha). The same structure, however, limited 2025 drawdown to −9.82% while SPY fell −18.76% — a 8.9 pp gap that illustrates the model's primary purpose: drawdown control over maximum return capture.

回測區間：2019.01.02 – 2026.05.06  ·  基準：標普500（SPY） ·  單邊手續費：0.15%  ·  每週調倉

02 · 業績分析

📈 標普500原始收益領先的原因

2019–2026年市場結構上被科技巨頭高度集中化所主導。2024年標普500前十大持倉佔指數超35%——英偉達在2023、2024年分別上漲超200%。

SPY的市值加權機制自動完整捕獲了這種集中度。輪動模型在廣泛ETF宇宙中分散配置，並進行明確的Regime風控，有意識地降低了對科技巨頭的暴露——在2021年（SPY +30.51% vs 模型 +22.01%）和2024年（SPY +25.59% vs 模型 +5.16%）尤為明顯。

這是模型的設計初衷：以適度讓出收益換取大幅降低回撤。2024年推高收益的同一集中度，導致了2022年標普500暴跌34%，而模型當年僅虧損17.78%。

🛡️ 風控能力的代價與收益

讓出0.75%的年化收益，模型在每項風控指標上均取得了顯著改善——這是系統化風險管理最有力的論據。

每年讓出的收益
−0.75%/年
最大回撤縮小
−10.14 pp（縮小30%）
夏普比率提升
+0.113
卡瑪比率提升
+0.192

2020年新冠崩盤：模型 −21.80% vs SPY −33.72%——最關鍵時刻保護了11.9個百分點。
2022年熊市：模型 −17.78% vs SPY −18.65%——防守期短債收益扭轉超額為正。

Plain-language model diagnostic notes — what drove this week's output and what conditions the model is monitoring. Transparent, honest, complete.簡明的模型診斷說明——本週輸出的驅動因素與模型正在監測的市場條件。透明、誠實、完整。

Research Notes — Public Excerpt研究備注 — 公開節選

Recent market strength has remained concentrated in technology-related sectors, while broader participation remains mixed. Trend conditions remain constructive but volatility conditions should continue to be monitored. The model's risk score reflects a moderate environment — neither strongly risk-on nor risk-off.近期市場強勢集中於科技相關板塊，更廣泛的市場參與度仍然參差。趨勢條件維持建設性，但波動率狀況仍需持續監測。模型風險評分反映適度環境——既非強烈進攻也非防禦。

Research Notes — Public Excerpt研究備注 — 公開節選

A-share sector momentum remains concentrated in technology and semiconductor themes. Broader market participation has improved marginally but policy-sensitive sectors warrant continued monitoring. The model's risk environment reading remains moderate.A 股板塊動量集中於科技與半導體主題。更廣泛市場參與度略有改善，但政策敏感板塊仍需持續關注。模型風險環境讀數維持溫和。

FAQ

Frequently asked questions.常見問題

What exactly is this service?這個服務究竟是什麼？
Alpha Rotation Lab is a rules-based market research publication focused on ETF trend and momentum analysis. We publish systematic model outputs — not investment advice, not personalised recommendations. All subscribers receive identical published content each week.阿爾法輪動實驗室是一個專注於 ETF 趨勢與動量分析的規則驅動市場研究出版物。我們發佈系統化模型輸出——不提供投資建議，不提供個性化推薦。所有訂閱者每週收到相同的已發佈內容。
Does this constitute investment advice?這構成投資建議嗎？
No. Nothing in this publication constitutes investment advice, financial advice, legal advice, tax advice, or a recommendation to buy or sell any security. Alpha Rotation Lab is not a registered investment adviser. All model outputs are hypothetical. You are solely responsible for your own investment decisions.不構成。本出版物任何內容均不構成投資建議、財務建議、法律建議、稅務建議，或任何買賣證券的推薦。阿爾法輪動實驗室不是註冊投資顧問。所有模型輸出均為假設性結果。
Which plan should I choose?應該選哪個方案？
If you primarily follow one market, the single-market plan at $9.99 USD/month is sufficient. If you follow both US and A-share markets, the Bundle at $14.99 USD saves $4.98/month vs buying both.如果您主要關注單一市場，9.99 美元/月的單市場方案已足夠。如果您同時關注美股和 A 股，14.99 美元套餐比分開購買節省 4.98 美元/月。
How do I access the research after subscribing?訂閱後如何訪問研究內容？
After payment via LemonSqueezy, you'll receive a welcome email with a Notion invite link. You'll be added as a viewer to the private subscriber research page within 24 hours of confirmed payment.通過 LemonSqueezy 完成付款後，您將收到包含 Notion 邀請鏈接的歡迎郵件，確認付款後 24 小時內獲得私密訂閱者研究頁面的訪問權限。
Can I cancel anytime?可以隨時取消嗎？
Yes. Cancel anytime with one click via LemonSqueezy. No lock-in period, no cancellation fees.是的。通過 LemonSqueezy 一鍵隨時取消，無鎖定期，無取消費用。
Important Disclaimer重要免責聲明
The model outputs published by Alpha Rotation Lab are a research and educational publication.

Nothing contained herein constitutes:
  • investment advice,
  • financial advice,
  • legal advice,
  • tax advice, or
  • a recommendation to buy or sell any security.

This publication does not provide individualized investment advice or personalized recommendations. All model outputs are published uniformly to all subscribers and are based solely on systematic research methodologies.

Geographic Restriction: NOT available to mainland China residents. Subscription does not constitute any bypass of this restriction.
Disclosure: Author may hold positions in securities discussed.
Performance Warning: Investing involves risk, including possible loss of principal. Past performance, backtests, and hypothetical results do not guarantee future outcomes. Backtest results do not account for taxes or slippage beyond the 0.15%/trade cost included.
Publication Timing: Research updates are generally published weekly after market close analysis, typically before the next trading session. All subscribers receive identical published research content. 阿爾法輪動實驗室推出的模型輸出是一個研究與教育性出版物。

本出版物任何內容均不構成：
  • 投資建議，
  • 財務建議，
  • 法律建議，
  • 稅務建議，或
  • 任何買賣證券的推薦。

本出版物不提供個性化投資建議或個人化推薦。所有模型輸出均統一向所有訂閱者發佈，僅基於系統化研究方法論。

地域限制：不向中國大陸居民提供服務。訂閱不構成對此限制的任何規避。
利益披露：作者可能持有所提及證券的倉位。
業績警告：投資存在風險，可能損失全部本金。歷史業績、回測及假設性結果不保證未來收益。回測結果已含 0.15%/筆交易成本，但未扣除稅費及額外滑點。
發佈時間：研究更新通常於每週收盤後分析完成後發佈，一般在下一個交易日開盤前推送。所有訂閱者收到相同的已發佈研究內容。
